title: clock mode split (native vs experimental web)

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Starting mode split implementation: native_clock vs web_clock_experimental with hard guardrails.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Implemented explicit mode split with hard guardrails: mode choices are native_clock and web_clock_experimental; native mode rejects web options and web mode rejects native-only options. Experimental banner added for web mode.
